programme.title: Quo Vadis TV
programme.desc: Quo Vadis TV is committed to sharing the Biblical message in a way that makes Christian living practical, realistic, and attainable. Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg Open Interest
programme.desc: Delivering the market-moving news anyone needs to know to get a jump start on the U.S. trading day.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg Tech
programme.desc: Bloomberg Tech is the only daily live technology program with a focus on breaking news, market-moving reporting and analysis of global technology companies and stories. The program brings the audience interviews from the biggest names in the business, offering in-depth analysis and critical insights.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg Crypto
programme.desc: The latest news, analysis and interviews covering the people, transactions and technology shaping the world of decentralized finance.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Balance of Power" with host David Westin is a daily look at how politics is impacting global business decisions; top lawmakers, business executives and government leaders join to discuss doing business in today's volatile political climate.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg Businessweek Daily
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring reporting from the magazine that helps global leaders stay ahead, plus insight on the people, companies and trends shaping today's complex economy.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg: The Close
programme.desc: Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld break down the day's top market-moving stories and trading action around the closing bell.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Balance of Power" with host David Westin is a daily look at how politics is impacting global business decisions; top lawmakers, business executives and government leaders join to discuss doing business in today's volatile political climate.

programme.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly talk with AJ Andrews on baseball's momentum, softball's growth and why storytelling and authenticity are key to building the next generation of fans.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.desc: Humanoid robots that use AI are going mainstream, but they're far from proven. With billions of dollars invested, can they deliver real-world value, or will they fall short of the hype?

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg The Asia Trade
programme.desc: Bringing global investors everything you need to know as the trading day begins in Asia; Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping markets, from tech, to geopolitics, and the world's energy transition.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg: The China Show
programme.desc: Your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy; from politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and David Ingles give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter.

programme.title: Live: Insight With Haslinda Amin
programme.desc: In a volatile and unpredictable world, the show will be the definitive guide for the global news audience to get the complete picture on the biggest story of the day. With news making executives, officials and thought-leaders from the world of business, politics and academia we will explore a story through probing interviews and nuanced conversations. The hour of programming will also highlight the most relevant stories from India which is currently one of the hottest investment destinations, but also has compelling stories that play into the Bloomberg's priority issues such as Climate change, Diversity and Technological innovation.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa
programme.desc: A spotlight on the fast paced growth and major deals happening across the Middle East and Africa; linking the market drivers from overnight in the US and across Asia into the region's trading day, with deep dive analysis of the top business, energy and geopolitical stories shaping the decisions of traders across the Middle East, Africa and beyond.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: From London, essential morning viewing to stay ahead of the day's market trends with news stories from the U.S. and Asia in the lead-up to the opening of European markets.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg The Opening Trade
programme.desc: "The Opening Trade" explores things to know as markets open across Europe; analysis that isn't available anywhere else, a break-down of the biggest stories of the day and top guests who have skin in the game.

programme.title: Live: The Pulse with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: "The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics; based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg Brief
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Brief" delivers the market news, data and analysis viewers need to set their agendas.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern have the economy and global markets "under surveillance"; their daily conversations with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond cover the latest in business, investment, and geopolitics; no other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg Open Interest
programme.desc: Delivering the market-moving news anyone needs to know to get a jump start on the U.S. trading day.

programme.desc: Bloomberg Tech is the only daily live technology program with a focus on breaking news, market-moving reporting and analysis of global technology companies and stories. The program brings the audience interviews from the biggest names in the business, offering in-depth analysis and critical insights.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg Deals
programme.desc: A weekly, midday program that delivers high-impact, editorially driven coverage of the most important corporate transactions shaping the market. With a mix of original Bloomberg reporting, market data, guest analysis, and Bloomberg Intelligence.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg Technology
programme.desc: Technology is not only becoming an increasingly important part of people's lives but also of the American economy. "Bloomberg Technology" takes a look at how the latest happenings in the tech industry are affecting the U.S. markets. Analysis, commentary, interviews and interactive graphics are among the staples of the show that help viewers understand the impact the technology sector has on the economy. The show, which was originally titled "Bloomberg West," is anchored by Emily Chang in San Francisco.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg Real Yield
programme.desc: Not everyone has a lot of money to invest, which is why Bloomberg has financial indices that are based on fixed income, which is also the focus on this weekly show. The program covers news and trends in the fixed-income market and includes interviews with guests from major financial institutions. "Bloomberg Real Yield" incorporates data and analysis from terminal bond experts to help dive into topics that are moving the bond markets in order to help empower viewers to make knowledgeable financial decisions.

programme.title: Leaders with Lacqua
programme.desc: What drives the world's most influential minds?; in Leaders with Francine Lacqua, Bloomberg's award-winning anchor sits down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas; discover what inspires them, how they navigate power and the lessons they offer on defining success. Insightful, cinematic and elegantly crafted, "Leaders" goes beyond the headlines to reveal the human side of leadership.

programme.title: The David Rubenstein Show: Peer to Peer Conversations
programme.desc: Financier and philanthropist David Rubenstein talks with his peers - leaders of some of America's biggest companies - in this interview show that aims to answer the question of what makes a great leader; Rubenstein uses his chats to explore successful leadership skills through the personal and professional choices made by the business world's most influential people; Rubenstein travels across the country to find out about the business leaders' stories and uncover information about their paths to success; the interview subjects include Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates, Berkshire Hathaway chairman Warren Buffett and Pepsi CEO Indra Nooyi.

programme.desc: (1949) Muscular film noir starring Burt Lancaster and Yvonne De Carlo. A dame convinces her ex-husband, an armoured car guard, to come in on a daring robbery.

programme.title: Twelve O'Clock High
programme.desc: (1949) World War II drama starring Gregory Peck as a US general who must treat a demoralised bomber squadron severely to restore discipline. With Oscar-winning support from Dean Jagger.

programme.title: Jerry & Marge Go Large
programme.desc: (2022) Fact-based comedy starring Bryan Cranston and Annette Bening as a retired couple who find a way to exploit a lottery loophole. But then some rich kids try to muscle in...

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: (2018) Dark sci-fi action with Tom Hardy as Marvel's anti-hero. A reporter becomes inhabited by a ferocious extraterrestrial that has its own ideas on how to behave. With Michelle Williams.

programme.title: T2 Trainspotting
programme.desc: (2017) Ewan McGregor, Ewen Bremner, Robert Carlyle and Jonny Lee Miller star in Danny Boyle's sequel to the classic darkly comedic drama. Renton returns to Edinburgh after 20 years away...

programme.title: Ravenous
programme.desc: (1999) Darkly comic horror with Guy Pearce and Robert Carlyle. In 1840s California, an American soldier with a taste for human flesh struggles to stay clean in the face of bad influence.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: A Room with a View
programme.desc: (1985) Helena Bonham Carter stars in this Merchant/Ivory film as an innocent on holiday in Florence, where a meeting with Julian Sands leads to romance.

programme.title: The Shepherd of the Hills
programme.desc: (1941) John Wayne stars as a moody young man living in the Ozarks who has sworn revenge on his long-absent father for deserting his mother. Then a kindly stranger appears on the scene...

programme.title: Fixed Bayonets!
programme.desc: (1951) Korean War drama about the stress of battle. Officers drop one by one as a US platoon fights a rearguard action, leaving one unwilling man (Richard Basehart) to take their place.

programme.title: Robin and Marian
programme.desc: (1976) Touching romance starring Sean Connery and Audrey Hepburn. The ageing legend Robin Hood returns to Sherwood Forest and discovers that, while he was away, Marian has become an Abbess.

programme.title: Horizon Line
programme.desc: (2020) Potential disaster-in-the-skies thriller with Allison Williams and Alexander Dreymon. A couple must fly their small plane to safety when the pilot dies. Easy, right?

programme.title: Venom: Let There Be Carnage
programme.desc: (2021) Tom Hardy returns as Marvel's gnarly antihero, to face a symbiote spawned from Venom's own blood living inside a serial killer who looks just like Woody Harrelson. Yikes.

programme.title: Snake Eyes
programme.desc: (2021) Violent martial arts action. A brooding cage fighter (Henry Golding) is contracted to assassinate a target but saves him instead, so that he can infiltrate an ancient ninja society.

programme.title: In the Earth
programme.desc: (2021) Ben Wheatley's horror with Reece Shearsmith. When a key scientist goes missing during a pandemic, the search for her is foiled by a strange and mystical man living deep in the woods.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Destroyer
programme.desc: (1943) Second World War drama about a warship assigned to mail runs but that ends up engaged in battle anyway, starring Edward G Robinson, Glenn Ford and Marguerite Chapman.

programme.title: The Undefeated
programme.desc: (1969) Civil War-era western starring John Wayne and Rock Hudson. Union and Confederate soldiers reluctantly join forces to fight against Mexican Emperor Maximillian's invasion.

programme.title: Imitation of Life
programme.desc: (1959) Lana Turner and Oscar-nominated Juanita Moore star in Douglas Sirk's powerful melodrama, which explores race relations and mother-daughter relationships.

programme.title: Le Mans '66
programme.desc: (2019) Oscar-winning sports drama starring Matt Damon and Christian Bale. In the 60s, Ford set out to build a car that can defeat Ferrari at the 24 Hours of Le Mans race.

programme.title: Midnight Run
programme.desc: (1988) Action comedy. Robert De Niro stars as a bounty hunter transporting a criminal from New York to Los Angeles with the FBI and the mob hot on their tail. With Charles Grodin.

programme.title: Sightseers
programme.desc: (2012) Ben Wheatley's dark and violent comedy-drama stars Alice Lowe and Steve Oram as lovers whose initially innocent tour of the British countryside turns into a disturbing odyssey.

programme.title: Track 29
programme.desc: (1988) Dennis Potter's psychological drama with Gary Oldman and Theresa Russell. The life of a sexually-frustrated wife gets a little too exciting when a handsome stranger rocks up.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Canyon Passage
programme.desc: (1946) Frontier western starring Dana Andrews. An ambitious businessman journeys to rural Oregon where a complex web of life and love waits to ensnare him. Directed by Jacques Tourneur.

programme.title: Drums Along the Mohawk
programme.desc: (1939) John Ford western with Henry Fonda and Claudette Colbert. In 1776, a settler and his wife attempt to farm in the Mohawk Valley but face attacks from Native Americans and the English.

programme.title: It Came from Outer Space
programme.desc: (1953) Richard Carlson stars as an astronomer who sees an alien craft land. But nobody believes him - until the cloning starts in Jack Arnold's science-fiction classic.

programme.title: The Art of Racing in the Rain
programme.desc: (2019) Touching comedy-drama. An ageing golden retriever (voiced by Kevin Costner) tells the story of his life with his best pal, a budding Formula 1 driver.

programme.title: Gemini Man
programme.desc: (2019) Will Smith stars in Ang Lee's action-thriller as both an over-the-hill hitman and the young clone of himself sent to take him out. With Clive Owen.

programme.title: Bad Times at the El Royale
programme.desc: (2018) Crime thriller with Jeff Bridges, Jon Hamm, Dakota Johnson and Chris Hemsworth. Shifty strangers collide in a sleazy-but-glamorous deserted motel with its own buried secrets.

programme.title: Free Fire
programme.desc: (2016) Ben Wheatley's action-thriller starring Armie Hammer, Brie Larson, Sharlto Copley, Cillian Murphy and Michael Smiley. An IRA arms deal in 1970s Boston goes disastrously wrong.

programme.title: Nothing Personal
programme.desc: (1995) Drama. In 1975 - during The Troubles - the lives of a disparate group of Belfast residents collide on one night as they move through the city, under the constant threat of violence.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Anastasia
programme.desc: (1956) Historical drama. The Oscar-winning Ingrid Bergman stars as an amnesiac refugee who Yul Brynner tries to pass off as the daughter of the murdered Tsar of Russia, Nicholas II.

programme.title: Jingle All the Way
programme.desc: (1996) Brian Levant's festive all-action comedy. Arnold Schwarzenegger is on a mission to get his son (Jake Lloyd) the must-have Christmas toy, Turbo Man. But it's sold out everywhere...

programme.title: Heaven Knows, Mr Allison
programme.desc: (1957) Second World War drama. Deborah Kerr plays a nun stranded on a Japanese-held Pacific island, with an untalkative marine (Robert Mitchum) as her only companion and hope of salvation.

programme.title: Flight of the Phoenix
programme.desc: (2004) Drama. Dennis Quaid stars as the captain of an aircraft downed in the desert. There's no hope of rescue, unless he and the survivors can build another plane from the wreckage.

programme.title: The Day After Tomorrow
programme.desc: (2004) Tense sci-fi thriller starring Jake Gyllenhaal and Dennis Quaid. A scientist sets out to save his son when global warming plunges the world into a sudden climatic catastrophe.

programme.title: Sisu
programme.desc: (2022) Jalmari Helander's ultra-violent, Nazi-slaying survival adventure starring Jorma Tommila. A bunch of Nazis try to steal a grizzled Finnish ex-soldier's gold. But he ain't having it.

programme.title: The Forever Purge
programme.desc: (2021) Dystopian crime thriller sequel. The NFFA are back. The Purge is back. Racists feel empowered. And when migrants start to go missing in Texas, it seems like the Purge will never end.

programme.title: Terminator: Dark Fate
programme.desc: (2019) Sci-fi action sequel with Linda Hamilton and Arnold Schwarzenegger. A factory worker is targeted by deadly robot assassins from the future. Thank goodness he's back.

programme.title: 3ABN Hoy En Vivo
programme.desc: Diferentes temas de interés basados en las enseñanzas bíblicas con la asistencia de pastores adventistas.

programme.title: Descubra
programme.desc: Conferencias sobre encuentro del significado cristiano en la vida con la lectura de las Sagradas Escrituras.

programme.title: Enfoque Teológico
programme.desc: Estudios de la Biblia, la trascendencia de su mensaje, preguntas y respuestas, revelaciones y su atemporalidad.

programme.title: Orígenes: Diseño inteligente en la genética
programme.desc: Un programa donde se explican los orígenes del planeta y la creación de la Tierra. Además, los métodos de datación de los minerales y otros tópicos respaldan la creencia de un diseño inteligente.

programme.title: Educando Para la Eternidad
programme.desc: Espacio para hacer conciencia sobre los diferentes roles sociales en cuyas manos está el papel de educar en el nombre de Dios.

programme.title: GYC en Español 2013
programme.desc: Se procura equipar e inspirar a jóvenes a ser embajadores cristianos en sus respectivos lugares de trabajo y estudio.

programme.title: Cuerpo y Espíritu Aeróbicos
programme.desc: Información de estilo de vida saludable con sesiones de ejercicios aeróbicos de intensidad baja a moderada.

programme.title: Las avenidas del alma
programme.desc: Una mirada a los métodos y tácticas que Satanás utiliza a través de los cinco sentidos humanos para llevar a las personas al pecado y corromper sus vidas.

programme.title: Anclas de la Verdad
programme.desc: Un programa con temas muy interesantes sobre las Sagradas Escrituras, llevando el mensaje de Dios.

programme.title: Los niños también alaban
programme.desc: Los niños cantan y alaban al Señor.

programme.title: Los niños también alaban
programme.desc: Los niños cantan y alaban al Señor.

programme.title: Cocina con color
programme.desc: Priscilla y Patricia hacen recetas saludables, nutritivas, divertidas y llenas de color y sabor, fáciles y divertidas.

programme.title: Viva En Abundancia
programme.desc: La salud mental y física, cómo llevar una vida el equilibrio y estar al tanto de los mecanismos de prevención.

programme.title: 3ABN Hoy En Vivo
programme.desc: Diferentes temas de interés basados en las enseñanzas bíblicas con la asistencia de pastores adventistas.

programme.title: La vida, la muerte y la resurrección
programme.desc: Serie de estudios bíblicos centrados en la perspectiva cristiana y adventista sobre el ciclo de la vida, el estado de los muertos y la esperanza de la resurrección.

programme.title: Mejor Cada Día
programme.desc: Los problemas que aquejan a la salud y cómo reconocerlos y buscar los mejores recursos para su mejoría.

programme.title: Maravillosa creación
programme.desc: Ciencia y salud, ejercicios, dieta balanceada, consejos para contrarrestar sus problemas físicos y mejorar, con la participación de médicos y expertos.

programme.title: Escrito está
programme.desc: Un programa cristiano internacional de televisión que se dedica a compartir el entendimiento de la palabra de Dios con las personas de todo el mundo.

programme.title: Primicias
programme.desc: La lucha entre el periódico y el canal de noticias es permanente, cada uno trabaja duro por conseguir la primicia. A la cabeza del diario, Américo Baigorria trata de poner paz entre sus propios empleados.

programme.title: Vence
programme.desc: Respuesta a los problemas de la actualidad, las adicciones, el abuso, las crisis extremas y sin salidas.

programme.title: Dios y la mujer del siglo 21
programme.desc: Un espacio para sanar a través de ayuda profesional y reflexiones espirituales, ayudando al público con sus miedos e inseguridades.

programme.title: Descubriendo los Símbolos del Apocalipsis
programme.desc: Serie profética que estudia el Libro del Apocalipsis como revelación de Jesucristo, cómo buscar la fe y la esperanza.

programme.title: Los mensajes de los tres ángeles
programme.desc: Distintos referentes exponen temas donde se explican y aclaran mensajes relevantes para el día de hoy.

programme.title: Hay Esperanza
programme.desc: Sermones que reflexionan sobre la palabra de Dios, lectura de textos que enseñan lecciones de vida y muestran un camino de luz.

programme.title: A Cristo Adoremos
programme.desc: Estudio bíblico, devocionario que reflexiona sobre la palabra de Dios y el sentido en la vida de los hombres.

programme.title: Valora y mejora tu salud
programme.desc: Se presentan temas relevantes y educativos. Se cuenta con diferentes expositores.

programme.title: Madres de rodillas
programme.desc: Un programa que ayuda a unir a las familias por medio de la oración intercesora. Un grupo de damas comparte experiencias vividas como mujer soltera, mujer casada, como madre y abuela.

programme.title: Salud Total
programme.desc: Métodos para mantener un cuerpo sano, diferentes expertos explican los problemas de salud en el mundo de hoy.

programme.title: Sus Palabras Son Vida
programme.desc: Lectura de diferentes pasajes de la Biblia con la participación del público que sugiere los pasajes bíblicos.

programme.title: Volvamos a la Naturaleza
programme.desc: Música de inspiración combinada con hermosas imágenes.

programme.title: Buenos Días Señor Jesús
programme.desc: Iniciando el día orando y alabando al Señor.

programme.title: Vida en Acción
programme.desc: Rutina de ejercicios fáciles, consejos para una dieta saludable, cómo poner en sus manos su salud a través de la actividad física y vivir bien.

programme.title: Amiguitos de Jesús
programme.desc: Valores morales y espirituales que ayudará a los niños a cultivar un mejor carácter.

programme.title: Ciencia 360
programme.desc: Programa que responde las preguntas que tienen que ver con ciencia y religión, con el ánimo de educar y guiar.

programme.title: 3ABN Hoy Cocina
programme.desc: Recetas fáciles de hacer y saludables, las mejores versiones de platillos tradicionales.

programme.title: Remedios Caseros
programme.desc: Remedios naturales y fáciles para afrontar diferentes condiciones crónicas o degenerativos y enseñar al maneo del un nuevo estilo de vida.

programme.title: El Cristiano Victorioso
programme.desc: Presentado por el Doctor Senez Rodríguez, el ciclo ofrece herramientas prácticas para ayudar a los espectadores a tener una vida victoriosa con Cristo.

programme.title: La biblia sorprende
programme.desc: Entiende la Biblia sin los dogmas del clero. Las verdaderas enseñanzas de la Biblia de forma simple y amena. Teología sencilla para todos, con sentido del humor.

programme.title: Conexiones Bíblicas
programme.desc: Diferentes temas que tienen que ver con la Biblia y su comprensión y puesta en contexto, el alcance de su mensaje.

programme.title: Salvación en señales y símbolos
programme.desc: El pastor Carlos Muñoz, el doctor Héctor Delgado y su panel explican de forma sencilla el mensaje, los secretos y el lenguaje.

programme.title: Saúde e Você
programme.desc: Problemas que aquejan a la salud y cómo evitarlos manteniendo una vida sana y tomando medidas de prevención.

programme.title: Espaço Jovem
programme.desc: Conversaciones de jóvenes acerca de diferentes temas cristianos que tienen relación con su vida; su reflexión.

programme.title: Deadline to Disaster

programme.title: Deadline to Disaster
programme.desc: As Hurricane Michael fury peaks, deadly flying projectiles force a storm tracker and his team to ride out the eyewall in their car; Panama City News Herald employees hunker down at a building housing their printing press.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: A twister outbreak in Texas leaves a storm chaser trapped; in Florida, dangerous riptides drag swimmers out to sea; a sudden storm hits a holiday resort in Greece; a giant wave crashes through a restaurant in Italy.

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: The LA Fire Department battle to rescue residents trapped by the flames in California; the biggest twister to hit the US for 60 years rips apart Joplin, Missouri; in Antarctica, a husband and wife brave extreme elements to set a new record.

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: Queensland, Australia is shaken by the most devastating flood in its history; in Kansas, two storm chasers track a terrifying twister; a base jumper gets stranded in freezing temperatures in Iceland; a destructive hail storm pummels Texas.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S03 E04 Burton Mossman Crosses the Line After failing to capture ruthless murderer Augustine Chacon on U.S. soil, Arizona Ranger Burton Mossman relinquishes his badge to cross the border; in Mexico, he goes under cover as a horse thief to join Chacon's gang and spring his trap.

programme.title: Into the Wild Frontier
programme.desc: S03 E06 Christopher Gist: Unsung Hero of the First Frontier After mapping the rugged Ohio Country, frontiersman and surveyor Christopher Gist accepts a mission to lead a young George Washington to a remote French fort in the Ohio wilderness on a diplomatic journey.

programme.title: Think Big
programme.desc: Children are the future -- and so are their inventions, which is why "Think Big" could be an important show. It features young inventors competing to see who can come up with the most-innovative invention. Each episode features two teams in the Think Tank -- a studio filled with art supplies and construction materials -- who brainstorm and choose materials before sketching, designing and building a prototype to be presented to a judge, who determines a winner. The champions earn bragging rights and the coveted Genius Cup.

programme.title: Biz Kids

programme.title: America's Heartland
programme.desc: Much of the food Americans eat is produced by farmers and ranchers in the country's heartland, but many people don't know how it's produced. "America's Heartland" provides information about the people and processes responsible for the availability of food and fuel across the country and around the world. The show's reporters and producers tell stories in topics that include farm families, consumer issues, animal welfare and crop sustainability. Some episodes also take the show abroad to countries such as Egypt and Taiwan to show the impact American agriculture has on the global economy.

programme.title: Crush With Lee & Tiffany
programme.desc: "Crush With Lee & Tiffany" stars outdoor enthusiasts Lee and Tiffany Lakosky, a husband/wife team whose partnership begins in the home and extends to the woods of eastern Iowa and beyond. They love to bowhunt, and when they are not in New Mexico tracking elk or in North Carolina chasing turkeys -- among other travels -- they fulfill their passion for the sport on their Iowa farm, where they practice a strict land-management program for world-class white-tailed deer. "Let them go, let them grow," is a phrase the couple favors, but when the time comes to cull the herd, Lee and Tiffany demonstrate an uncanny ability to get the job done.

programme.title: Crush With Lee & Tiffany
programme.desc: "Crush With Lee & Tiffany" stars outdoor enthusiasts Lee and Tiffany Lakosky, a husband/wife team whose partnership begins in the home and extends to the woods of eastern Iowa and beyond. They love to bowhunt, and when they are not in New Mexico tracking elk or in North Carolina chasing turkeys -- among other travels -- they fulfill their passion for the sport on their Iowa farm, where they practice a strict land-management program for world-class white-tailed deer. "Let them go, let them grow," is a phrase the couple favors, but when the time comes to cull the herd, Lee and Tiffany demonstrate an uncanny ability to get the job done.

programme.title: The Guns of Navarone
programme.desc: Allied commandos (Gregory Peck, David Niven, Anthony Quinn) try to knock out a Nazi fortress over the Aegean.

programme.title: Hell Is for Heroes
programme.desc: Exhausted GIs (Steve McQueen, Bobby Darin, Fess Parker) are ordered to hold part of the Siegfried line guarded by a pillbox.

programme.title: Operation Pacific
programme.desc: A U.S. submarine commander (John Wayne) alienates his crew and ex-wife (Patricia Neal), then takes on the Japanese fleet.

programme.title: Major Dundee
programme.desc: A Union major (Charlton Heston) chases Indians to Mexico with a condemned Confederate captain (Richard Harris) and a cavalry of prisoners.

programme.title: Masterson of Kansas
programme.desc: In the 1870s, Marshal Wyatt Earp (Bruce Cowling) calls upon Dodge City, Kan., Sheriff Bat Masterson (George Montgomery) to track down rancher Merrick (John Maxwell), who is accused of murder. But, thanks to some proof held by local Native American Chief Yellow Hawk (Jay Silverheels), Masterson realizes Merrick might be the victim of a frame-up. So, with the help of Earp and gunfighter Doc Holliday (James Griffith), Masterson sets out to find those who are really behind the killing.

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: Set in the Libyan desert in 1942 where a group of American soldiers become isolated in their tank during the retreat to El Alamein. As they drive across the desert they pick up a group of Allied stragglers, but with their supplies of fuel, food and water running low, they try to reach a desert fortress, but a large German detachment is also heading there.

programme.title: The Story of Dr. Wassell
programme.desc: This film presents a dramatization of the wartime heroics of naval doctor Corydon M. Wassell (Gary Cooper), who is stationed in the East Indies during a Japanese attack on the USS Marblehead. After the less seriously wounded soldiers are evacuated to Australia, Wassell stays in Java to save those left behind. As the Japanese advance, he risks his life and defies orders in an attempt to rescue as many as possible. His actions are later recognized in a radio address given by President Roosevelt.

programme.title: Lawless Range
programme.desc: Rodeo man John Middleton (John Wayne) is called upon for a favor by Hank Mason (Wally Howe), a friend of the Middletons who lives in a nearby town. But, when John arrives at Hank's, the man's niece, Ann (Sheila Mannors), informs him that Hank has been abducted. John then teams up with the local sheriff, takes on a disguise and begins investigating cattle rustlers who could be connected to the disappearance. He's led to a corrupt banker (Frank McGlynn Jr.), who has plans to take over the town.

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Mary Morstan has received a pearl in the post every year since her father's disappearance; when she is summoned to meet her mysterious benefactor, Holmes and Watson accompany her, leading to the truth about a secret pact.

After the less seriously wounded soldiers are evacuated to Australia, Wassell stays in Java to save those left behind. programme.title: Flying Leathernecks
programme.desc: As the new commanding officer of a squadron of Marine pilots, Maj. Daniel Kirby (John Wayne), a stern and strict leader, cannot believe the lack of discipline exhibited by the soldiers. As the men resist Kirby's harsh adherence to orders, Capt. Carl Griffin (Robert Ryan) leads their cause for a more relaxed environment. But by pushing his men beyond their limits, Kirby slowly transforms them into battle-ready warriors, forcing all of them to make sacrifices along the way.

programme.title: Masterson of Kansas

programme.title: The Fighting Seabees
programme.desc: A morale-boosting tribute to the US Navy's Construction Battalions who followed behind the troops invading Pacific islands held by the Japanese to build runways, roads and bridges. Wedge Donovan is the civilian head of a construction company approached by the Navy to train their men as specialists. Instead, the impetuous Donovan wants to prove his crew are up to the job, but they are shot up by the Japanese.

While vying with Reynolds for the affections of singer Joby Madison (Pauline Moore), the Kid discovers a swindled miner (Noah Beery Jr.) who claims to be the Carson City Kid.

programme.title: The Train
programme.desc: With the Allies poised to retake Paris from the Germans, Col. Franz Von Waldheim (Paul Scofield) conspires to sneak out by train all the art masterpieces looted by the German army. But museum curator Mademoiselle Villard (Suzanne Flon) alerts the French Resistance, and soon railway inspector Paul Labiche (Burt Lancaster) is pressed into service. He reroutes the train, and cleverly deceives Von Waldheim by renaming each train station along the way.

programme.title: Sands of Iwo Jima
programme.desc: Marine Sgt. John Stryker (John Wayne) is despised by his own men for his rough attitude and exhausting training regimen. As the war in the Pacific progresses, though, they begin to respect Stryker's hard-edged outlook on war and his brutal training methods, as it has helped them prepare for the harsh realities of the battlefield. They'll need all of Stryker's battle tactics if they want to survive what will end up being one of the bloodiest engagements of the war: the Battle of Iwo Jima.

programme.title: Destry Rides Again
programme.desc: The small town of Bottleneck is under the control of Kent (Brian Donlevy), a power-hungry boss who gets control over the local cattle ranchers by winning a rigged game of cards. When the local sheriff questions the legitimacy of the game, Kent has him killed and names the town drunk, Dimsdale (Charles Winninger), as sheriff. What Kent doesn't know is that Dimsdale knows legendary lawman Tom Destry, who in turns sends his daring son Tom Destry Jr. (James Stewart) to Bottleneck to save the day.

Despite several casualties, the men are determined to press forward, even if it means striking a deal with the opposing army.

programme.title: The Nevadan

Barclay changes horses at the ranch of Karen Galt (Dorothy Malone), planting the seeds of romance before following Tanner to a mine shaft where the stashed loot is hidden. But a gang of outlaws who also want the gold then arrives, forcing Tanner and Barclay to team up and fend them off together.

programme.title: The Hanging Tree
programme.desc: Joseph "Doc" Frail (Gary Cooper) is a doctor with a past he's trying to outrun. While in Montana, he comes across a mining camp with a hanging tree and rescues a man named Rune (Ben Piazza) from the noose. With Rune as his servant, Frail decides to settle down, and he takes over as town doctor. He meets Elizabeth (Maria Schell), who is suffering from shock, and the two soon fall in love. But when Elizabeth is attacked, Frail's attempt to help her land them both in trouble.

programme.title: Riding Shotgun
programme.desc: A cowboy is hired to ride shotgun on a stagecoach, but his personal mission is to find a brutal killer and deliver justice. After the cowboy is lured from his post by a clue that might lead to the killer, he leaves the stagecoach unprotected.

programme.title: Breaker Morant

British Commander-in-Chief Lord Kitchener is determined to see the men found guilty, which he can use as a bargaining chip in an impending peace conference with the Boers.

programme.title: Josef Mengele: Hunting a Nazi Criminal
